actual_current_state_2026_04_26.py_files_in_history: deleted in commit 68d2236c (.py 791개 → .hexa 흡수 + 원본 폐기)
actual_current_state_2026_04_26.implementation_status: stub-only — most modules are declarative skeleton with TODO markers; 2 files have real logic (rp_adaptive_response.hexa 288L w/ 8 selftests, scripts/organize_recordings.hexa 192L partial)
actual_current_state_2026_04_26.interpretation: user-described 7964 LOC .py state is HISTORICAL; current .hexa stubs are surface-only. The migration question is therefore: stub → full hexa-only implementation with raw#9 strict compliance (selftest, deterministic, helper /tmp emit pattern for external deps).

modules.implementation_status: stub — returns hardcoded dummy params, no clamp logic actually applied
modules.rationale: PURE NUMERICAL — phi/tension → binaural beats freq + LED params + safety clamps. Zero external deps. Best raw#9 pilot candidate. Maps directly to rp_adaptive_response style (deterministic, selftest-able).

blockers: hardware-dependent — BrainFlow board.connect()/impedance_check requires physical OpenBCI device
modules.rationale: Hardware ingest → helper python emits BrainFlow connection result as kv-lines. Selftest mode uses synthetic board + fake impedance values.
Mirrors tool/an11_b_eeg_ingest.hexa pattern (already 360 LOC raw#9 reference).

modules.implementation_status: stub — returns zeros for all band powers
modules.rationale: FFT band-power can be implemented natively via hexa-lang BLAS-lite (memory project_omega_philosophy_limits). Welch PSD = windowed FFT averaging. Topomap rendering would split off as WRAPPER (matplotlib).

6 metrics (LZ complexity, Hurst, PSD slope, autocorr, criticality, dist-match) all numerical. LZ + Hurst + autocorr are pure integer/float. PSD slope uses Welch (shared with analyze). Brain-like 85.6% target should be re-validated post-port (production-impact risk).

blockers: paradigm runner needs hardware + marker injection
live BLE stream + matplotlib live plot
dual stream sync — BLE + Phi engine

modules.rationale: Pure JSON consumer + 6-metric ratio comparison. Depends on validate_consciousness being FULL first.

modules.implementation_status: production — TSRV-P3-3 EEG adaptive response, 8 selftests, deterministic, latency budget < 100ms, PSI_ALPHA=0.014
modules.rationale: Already raw#9 compliant. Single file, no cross-imports, deterministic float ops + selftest battery. Reference exemplar for pure-numerical hexa modules within anima-eeg/.
If realtime is WRAPPER, bci_control consumes its JSON output — can be FULL on top of realtime WRAPPER.
Pure ln() math: FAA = ln(right_alpha/F4) - ln(left_alpha/F3). 4-phase state machine. Selftest-able with synthetic alpha streams.
Sleep stage classification = threshold rules on band-power ratios. Depends on analyze being FULL.

blockers: currently panics with R37/AN13/L3-PY block. needs hexa-native replacement that depends on validate_consciousness FULL.
modules.rationale: Once validate_consciousness is FULL, this orchestrator just calls it monthly + writes JSON ledger. No external dep.

blockers: hexa-stdlib gaps: sqlite3, regex, datetime parsing, directory walking, JSON parse — all marked TODO[hexa-stdlib] in source
modules.implementation_status: structural skeleton 192L — function signatures + comments + 12 TODO[hexa-stdlib] markers
modules.target_path: anima-eeg/scripts/organize_recordings.hexa + /tmp/organize_recordings_helper.hexa_tmp (sqlite + datetime via python helper) OR wait for hexa-stdlib
modules.rationale: Most stdlib-blocked module. Either WRAPPER (helper python for sqlite + os.walk) or wait for hexa-lang stdlib expansion (memory project_omega_hexa_lang_limits R1.2/R3.2 patches were applied — fs portable but no sqlite yet).

verdict_summary.note: 21 .hexa files but rp_adaptive_response is exempt (already production-grade raw#9). Counting 20 candidate modules + 1 reference exemplar.

production_test_impact.current_evidence: anima-eeg/ contains no test files — likely tests live in /Users/ghost/core/anima/test/ or were removed with .py originals. Need to locate tests before any merge of FULL implementation.
production_test_impact.risk: HIGH if 108 tests still exist somewhere and exercise the .py interfaces; .hexa stubs would obviously fail them. Migration plan must (a) locate 108 tests, (b) preserve .py-equivalent semantics for FULL impl, (c) re-run 85.6% brain-likeness post-port.
production_test_impact.mitigation: Phase 2 pilot is purely additive (new file in migration_phase2_pilot/) — zero impact on tests. Phase 3+ requires test-locator + diff-equivalence pre-step.

external_dependency_honest_assessment.BrainFlow_BLE: CANNOT be replaced by hexa-only. Fundamentally requires Python BrainFlow binding to communicate with OpenBCI Cyton+Daisy hardware. WRAPPER is the only honest verdict.
external_dependency_honest_assessment.matplotlib_topomap: Rendering = wrapper. Numerical interpolation (e.g. RBF for topo grid) can be hexa-native; PNG output stays WRAPPER.
external_dependency_honest_assessment.scipy_signal: Welch PSD + butter filter can be ported to hexa (FFT + IIR coefficients). hexa-lang already has BLAS-lite + Jacobi eigh per memory project_omega_philosophy_limits. Estimated 200-300 LOC hexa-native FFT module is feasible.
external_dependency_honest_assessment.numpy: Array ops trivially expressible in hexa-lang. No blocker.
external_dependency_honest_assessment.sqlite3: No hexa-native sqlite binding known. WRAPPER or wait for hexa-stdlib.
external_dependency_honest_assessment.regex: Per memory project_omega_hexa_lang_limits, hexa-lang stdlib regex coverage limited. Substring matching often sufficient (calibrate, classify_file).

raw9_strict_checklist_per_module: header comment cites raw#9 hexa-only + spec doc
deterministic seed (rng default_rng(20260425)) when randomness needed
raw10_honest field for synthetic vs phenomenal data distinction
raw#37 helper python emit to /tmp (not git-tracked) when external dep required
byte-identical re-run reproducibility (selftest hash should match across runs)
